texts.InvalidAccessToken: Invalid access token, token validation failed
texts.NestedImpersonationNotAllowed: Nested impersonation is not allowed. You are currently in impersonation mode. Please revert to your original identity first
texts.InvalidImpersonationRequest: Invalid impersonation request. Please provide valid impersonation target parameters (User ID, Tenant ID, or Delegation ID)
texts.CannotImpersonateYourself: You cannot impersonate yourself. Please select a different user to impersonate
texts.InsufficientImpersonationPermission: Insufficient permission to perform user impersonation
texts.RequirePermissionToImpersonateUser: Authorization is required to simulate users/tenants!
texts.TenantAdminUserNameNotSpecified: Tenant admin user name is not specified. Tenant impersonation requires an admin user name
texts.TenantAdminUserNotFound: Tenant admin user not found: {0}. Please verify the admin user name is correct
texts.InvalidUserDelegation: Invalid user delegation. The delegation record does not exist or has expired
texts.NotAuthorizedForDelegation: Delegation authorization failed. Current user is not the target of this delegation
texts.DelegationSourceUserNotFound: Delegation source user not found. Unable to complete delegated impersonation
texts.NoImpersonationContext: No impersonation context found. Unable to revert to original user identity
texts.OriginalUserNotFound: Original user not found. The impersonator's user record may have been deleted
